title: reuse lwd_client for Bob scanner scan
description: In testnet_shielded_payment_end_to_end (e2e_testnet.rs line 461), a second LightwalletdClient::connect() call is made for Bob's scanner while Alice's client (lwd_client) is still live. HTTP/2 supports multiplexed streams so both scanners could share one connection. The second TLS handshake and TCP connection setup is unnecessary. The root cause is that CompactBlockScanner::new takes LightwalletdClient by value; changing it to take a shared reference or Arc would allow connection reuse and eliminate the extra handshake.
